message:
feat(fnx-runtime): tail stability gate for p99 distribution shift (br-7ybk E12)

Add TailStabilityTracker that maintains a baseline p99 and a sliding window
of recent samples. Detects regressions when window p99 exceeds baseline p99
by a configurable ratio (default 20%). Add TailStabilityGate that blocks
actions when regression is detected.

Features:
- Configurable baseline_samples, window_samples, max_p99_ratio, percentile
- Force lock baseline for early comparison
- Status snapshot with all metrics

Also fixes edge case in BayesianShrinkagePrior::shrinkage_weight for zero
prior_variance (returns 0.0 to use prior entirely).

10 new tests cover baseline collection, regression detection, window sliding,
gate blocking behavior, and reset functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
